title: Nami’s Illness Becomes Urgent
description: On pages 17–19, nami’s illness becomes urgent as the Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent.
scene: Nami’s Illness Becomes Urgent. The Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: The most important reason why all the little ones who come to this island,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Do not reach the next island lies straight ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You all risked your lives so that our pride can remain untarnished.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Thus, in turn, no matter the foe...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We must not let your flag of pride be furnished either...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Trust in us and sail straight ahead! No matter what happens, sail only straight ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We vow to clear a path!

summary: This part centers on nami’s illness becomes urgent, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
